message:
fix(pt-core): Add OutputFormat::Exitcode match arms and --capabilities alias

Fix exhaustive match warnings and improve CLI ergonomics:

1. Add missing OutputFormat::Exitcode => {} match arms to all output
   functions:
   - run_check()
   - run_config_validate()
   - output_config_error()
   - print_version()
   - output_stub()
   - output_capabilities()

   The Exitcode format intentionally produces no output - the exit code
   IS the output. Empty match arms make this explicit.

2. Add --capabilities as long-form alias for --caps in CheckArgs:
   #[arg(long = "capabilities", alias = "caps")]

   This improves discoverability while preserving the short form for
   muscle memory. The field name check_capabilities already matched
   the long form, this just makes the CLI consistent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
